linkPatterns.tooltip: Open resource: ${1} — CSS url() reference to an external file (image, font, stylesheet, or other resource).
Open imported stylesheet: ${1} — @import rule loading an external CSS file.
Open imported stylesheet: ${1} — @import rule using string URL syntax.
Open font file: ${1} — @font-face source reference to a web font file.
Open background image: ${1} — Background image resource referenced by url().
Open list marker image: ${1} — Custom list marker image.
Open cursor image: ${1} — Custom cursor image resource.
Open content resource: ${1} — Replaced content image for pseudo-elements.
Open mask image: ${1} — CSS mask image resource (SVG or image).
Open image from image-set: ${1} — Resolution-dependent image resource.
